arts.ttl: Leeds United 18-month wait to answer the haters may finally be about to end
arts.sum: Farke knows he is best used in the middle, but if Firpo does not shake off his training knock, Sam Byram’s injury and Isaac Schmidt’s limited preparation leave him little choice, but to go with Wober. There was a start in the alarming cup defeat to Middlesbrough, but, depending on Junior Firpo, tomorrow may see Wober return to a league XI for the first time since Tottenham Hotspur relegated the club in May 2023.

arts.ttl: West Ham could be about to make Leeds United’s promotion much more straightforward
arts.sum: Having lost their place in the top two with defeat at Blackburn, Leeds know that one of Burnley or ‘Boro (or both) will be dropping points tonight. The Whites take on Derby County at Elland Road on Saturday afternoon already knowing if they are capable of leapfrogging Burnley.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's Championship title rivals get huge transfer boost as takeover details emerge
arts.sum: One of Leeds United's title rivals has received the green light from potential new owners to secure two loan signings next month. Steven Rosen and Helmy Eltoukhy of COH Sports met with Chris Wilder during last month's derby win over Sheffield Wednesday, expressing their desire to support him in his efforts to promote the Blades.

arts.ttl: Director got approval for attacker before Leeds United move – Vetoed by hierarchy
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Besiktas’ hierarchy vetoed a move for Tottenham Hotspur attacker Manor Solomon before his loan transfer to Leeds United. The 25-year-old joined the Championship side on loan for the season during the last transfer window. Fotospor have reported on former Besiktas sporting director Brad Friedel’s pursuit for the The post Director got approval for attacker before Leeds United move – Vetoed by hierarchy appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: Piroe to strike against Rams
arts.sum: Mo Salah to find the net in the Merseyside derby will be a popular bet this weekend given the Egyptian's scoring streak but Steve Davies has five other potential goalscorers to look out for.

arts.ttl: Beren Cross's Leeds United notebook with 'Betty's-in-Harrogate soft' connection made
arts.sum: Earlier this week, Leeds United hosted their annual festive party at Elland Road for hundreds of junior members. Matthew Donohue will be in charge at Elland Road for Leeds United's encounter against Derby County on Saturday in the Championship.

arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises told to take Leeds United transfer 'gamble' in Championship promotion quest
arts.sum: Israeli outlet Sport5 states Maccabi Tel Aviv striker Dor Turgeman is a player of interest to the Championship club . The report claims United, who are said to have also looked at Maccabi Haifa midfielder Mahmoud Jaber, have "already" made an official approach for the Israel international.

arts.ttl: Leeds United v Derby County: Team news confirmed
arts.sum: Leeds United face Derby County at Elland Road this weekend, and the away side will be without two key midfielders Ebou Adams and David Ozoh. Derby team news pre-Leeds: Rams without Adams and Ozoh in midfield

arts.ttl: Moment of truth for San Francisco 49ers as Leeds United's ownership group eye Super Bowl repeat
arts.sum: Finding a way to finish is the challenge that has defined the 49ers’ season and, while the injury bug has bit hard this year, All-Pro linebacker Fred Warner, who last week revealed he has been playing on a broken ankle since late September, is not making any excuses as San Francisco looks to rediscover that winning touch. As was the case the last time the 49ers attempted to go one better after losing the Super Bowl the previous season, Kyle Shanahan’s team have dealt with a mountain of injuries, the latest of which ended a frustrating season for reigning Offensive Player of the Year Christian McCaffrey.

arts.ttl: Spygate, guard of honour: Jayden Bogle’s Leeds v Derby history
arts.sum: Leeds United right-back Jayden Bogle is facing former club Derby County this weekend, and it’s a fixture in which the defender has been at the thick of drama. Jayden Bogle set to face former club, first Leeds v Derby meeting since guard of honour
